description_long: This is a large, modern sectional lounge with an L-shaped configuration, upholstered in a deep blue fabric. The lounge features multiple seat and back cushions, all of which appear to be attached and uniformly sized, providing ample seating for several people. The backrest is straight and consistent in height, with no visible tufting or decorative segmentation, giving it a clean, contemporary look. Armrests are present at both ends, low-profile and straight, matching the overall minimalist design. The lounge sits on slender, black metal legs that are straight and slightly elevated, contributing to a light, airy appearance. The upholstery is solid in color with a matte finish, and the overall construction suggests comfort and durability suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional lounge in deep blue fabric with attached cushions, low straight armrests, and slim black metal legs. The design is modern, clean, and comfortable.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, attached cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chaise section and the straight backrest along the longer side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uniform backrest height and the slim metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the shorter section and the clean lines of the armrest and backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six seat cushions and six back cushions, all attached and evenly distributed along the L-shape, with a chaise section on one end.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrest with no tufting or segmentation, consistent height along both sections.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present at both ends, straight, low-profile, and padded.
attribute_leg_style: Slim, straight black metal legs, slightly elevated, with a minimalist design.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a matte, smooth texture and no visible pattern or tufting.
